title: Japanese Cold Soba Noodle Salad
description: A refreshing Japanese-inspired cold soba noodle salad filled with crunchy vegetables and a tangy dressing.
instructions: Cook the soba noodles according to the package instructions.
Rinse the noodles in cold water to stop the cooking process.
In a large bowl, combine the cooled noodles, sliced cucumbers, diced red bell pepper, grated carrots, and chopped green onions.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sesame seeds to make the dressing.
Pour the dressing over the noodle salad and toss to combine.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the salad cold, garnished with additional sesame seeds if desired.
